title: Power Query refresh lineage boundaries for synthetic source transitions
originSignal: A refresh plan changes a source, intermediate step, or output table and the lineage boundary is unclear.
riskPattern: Static M review can miss a source transition that changes privacy, schema, join cardinality, or refresh readiness.
regressionChecks: Build lineage evidence for synthetic source, transformation, and output steps.
Flag source transitions and dynamic schema steps that require a refresh-specific review.
Record row-count and column-shape expectations on each side of the boundary.
expectedEvidence: Lineage report identifies source, transformations, outputs, and source-risk findings.
M lint output records static refresh risks without claiming refresh success.
Synthetic case notes identify the boundary requiring live refresh evidence.
boundaries: This deterministic synthetic specification contains no customer source paths or workbook artifacts.
Static lineage evidence does not prove credential handling, privacy behavior, or live refresh success.
nextLiveWorkbookRequirement: Refresh a sanitized workbook against a task-local synthetic source folder and capture the target Excel runtime result.
